text: Plantar fascia stretching is effective for reducing first step pain in plantar heel pain in the short term, with a large effect size.
Taping provides small-to-moderate short-term relief of first step pain in plantar heel pain.
Core self-management for plantar heel pain should combine taping, plantar fascia stretching, education, and footwear advice.
Focused shockwave therapy is effective for first step pain in plantar heel pain across short-term, medium-term, and long-term timeframes.
Radial shockwave therapy is effective for first step pain in plantar heel pain in the short term and long term.
Custom foot orthoses provide small-to-moderate relief for general pain in plantar heel pain in the short and medium term.
specific_value: Short-term SMD: 0.41 (95% CI 0.07-0.74); Medium-term SMD: 0.55 (95% CI 0.09-1.02)

text: A stepped care approach is recommended for plantar heel pain: start with taping, stretching, and education; if insufficient improvement, add shockwave therapy; then custom orthoses.
